text:
From: ops.manager@batonrouge.client.com
Subject: URGENT: Need help - escalate an unresolved vibration alarm

Hi team,

We need someone to escalate an unresolved vibration alarm at Plant 7 - Baton Rouge as soon as possible. This has been flagged
multiple times this week and is starting to affect production.
Please advise on timing and next steps.

Thanks,
Plant Ops
